infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VNDRLY uses the camera to scan site QR codes and capture work-site photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VNDRLY uses your photo library to attach photos to tracking tickets.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VNDRLY records your GPS location at check-in and check-out to verify on-site work.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VNDRLY shares your live location with your vendor while you are en route or on site, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: VNDRLY shares your live location with your vendor while you are en route or on site, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: VNDRLY uses Face ID to sign you in quickly and securely.
